message:
test: type annotations, DecodeError method call fix, E5 closure + command split tests

ci_regression_gates: update is_recoverable() from method syntax to
associated-function syntax (DecodeError::is_recoverable(&err)) across
all decode retry paths, plus import DecodeError.

lean_proof_impact_closed_loop_report, lean_single_owner_conformance,
semantic_guardrail_mismatch_harness: add explicit type annotations to
closure parameters in is_some_and() calls (|value: &str|, |v: &Value|,
|workload: &Value|) for clarity and to satisfy stricter inference.

tokio_fs_process_signal_migration_playbook: add explicit fs::File type
annotations on async file open/create bindings.

raptorq_perf_invariants: three new tests:
- e3_track_e_highconf_closure_assessment_matches_recorded_tails:
  validates the high-confidence packet keeps E5 closure blocked with
  data-backed per-operation tail regression/improvement checks
- g3_e5_decision_record_command_surface_split_is_explicit: validates
  manifest vs probe repro commands stay on distinct benchmark surfaces
- e5_profile_pack_doc_explains_command_bundle_split: validates the
  baseline profile doc explains the command surface split

service_verification: new SVC-VERIFY-014A test verifying concurrency
limit wakes queued waiters without thread-local Cx, plus CountingWaker
helper.

doctor_full_stack_reference_project_matrix: new test
orchestration_stage_script_uses_staging_before_publish validating the
orchestration script's staging/publish token presence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -109,7 +109,7 @@ fn single_owner_invariant_theorem_list_complete() {
         .and_then(Value::as_array)
         .expect("lean_theorems array")
         .iter()
-        .filter_map(|v| v.as_str().map(String::from))
+        .filter_map(|v: &Value| v.as_str().map(String::from))
         .collect();
 
     let required = [
